message:
fix(vdbe): INSERT DEFAULT VALUES respects column DEFAULT constraints

Previously INSERT DEFAULT VALUES set all columns to NULL, ignoring
declared DEFAULT constraints. Now emit_default_value() parses the
column's DEFAULT text and emits the correct opcode (Integer, Real,
String8, CurrentTimestamp, etc.).

Also fixes INSERT with explicit column list: omitted columns now use
their DEFAULT value instead of NULL (via default_value_to_expr()).

Adds 2 regression tests. 236 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
